headline: Salesforce (CRM) Is Putting $1 Billion Into AI In Switzerland
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) has announced a $1b multi-year investment in Switzerland focused on agentic artificial intelligence. The company plans to expand its local presence, develop AI talent, and deepen partnerships with Swiss customers. This move reflects a broader international push for Salesforce's AI capabilities beyond its existing core markets. Salesforce, trading at $163.32 per share, is putting a clear spotlight on international AI expansion with this new Swiss commitment. For...
